gate.no_pro.title: Plot Coach — a Pro feature
gate.no_pro.body: Dialogue your plot into shape with an editorial coach.
gate.no_ai.title: Plot Coach — configure AI to start
gate.no_ai.body: The coach needs an AI provider configured to converse with you.
intake.welcome.body: I'll be your plot coach. Tell me about the story you're working on — the premise, the characters, the conflict — and we'll shape the plot together.
batch.preview.title: Batch preview
archive.end_session_confirm: End this session and start a fresh one? The current conversation will be archived — you can still view and export it from the archive drawer.
archive.end_session_error: Could not archive the session. Please try again.
archive.title: Session archive
insights.title: Coach context
insights.model.label: Active model
insights.context.title: What the coach can see
insights.hints.title: Try asking
insights.hints.subtitle: Click to start, edit before sending
insights.hints.discuss_act: Let's discuss Act 2 — what's it really about?
insights.hints.beats_to_chapters: Turn the approved beats into chapter stubs.
insights.hints.fill_empty_plot_point: Propose 3 beats for the next empty plot point.
insights.hints.tighten_descriptions: Tighten the descriptions on Act 1's beats.
insights.hints.find_duplicates: Spot any duplicate wiki entries we should merge.
insights.hints.what_is_missing: What's missing in Act 3 that the setup promises?
insights.hints.thinner_motivation: Push back on the protagonist's motivation — make it sharper.
insights.hints.subplot_idea: Pitch one subplot that would deepen the second act.
insights.hints.rehang_beat: Re-hang the beat that's clearly on the wrong plot point.
insights.hints.character_wound: Sharpen the protagonist's wound in one paragraph.
